data.html_notes:
Environment: [App version: iOS: v3.0.1 339 Used device: , iPhone 17 pro max, IOS version 26.2] Description When creating a new user or creating a new channel and starting to follow it, on the web the tip button doesn't appear and in the app send tip displays as inactive. After relogin the button appears Note: I am not sure is it from our side or Rumble side, but as far as I now it is important I am creating this issue Steps to Reproduce
  1. On the web create a new user or channel
  2. Start following it
Actual Result Tip button doesn't appear.
  1. Check on the app
Actual Result Send tip button is inactive Expected Result Tip button should appear and send tip button should be active
data.name: [Bckend - Tip jar] Tip button doesn't appear on the Rumble and Send Tip button is inactive after following the channel, user
data.notes:
Environment: [App version:  iOS: v3.0.1 339 Used device: , iPhone 17 pro max, IOS version 26.2]
Description 
When creating a new user or creating a new channel and starting to follow it, on the web the tip button doesn't appear and in the app send tip displays as inactive. After relogin the button appears
Note: I am not sure is it from our side or Rumble side, but as far as I now it is important I am creating this issue
 Steps to Reproduce 
    On the web create a new user or channel
    Start following it
 Actual Result  Tip button doesn't appear.
    Check on the app
 Actual Result  Send tip button is inactive
 Expected Result  Tip button should appear and send tip button should be active
